name: senna-breath-jaw
prompt: Two-shot close-up. Red-haired woman leaning close to silver-haired woman, confident smirk. Heat-shimmer around her contrasting with cool frost around the other. Split lighting — warm amber vs cold blue. Tension visible between them. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: But I'm patient. I've been melting you for two years. I can wait a little longer.

name: senna-withdraws
prompt: Medium shot. Red-haired woman stepping back, smoothing modified uniform with one hand. Confident smirk, heat-shimmer fading. Self-assured posture. Corridor behind her — glass windows, morning light. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: senna-walks-away
prompt: Medium wide shot. View past silver-haired woman's shoulder watching red-haired woman walking away down pristine corridor. Glass windows left, morning light streaming in. Confident stride, already victorious. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-frost-exhale
prompt: Close-up profile. Silver-haired woman exhaling, breath crystallizing into visible frost in the air. Relief and suppression. Ice-blue eyes forward. Cold blue lighting. Alone now. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: crystalline frost forming on breath, delicate ice crackling
